sha_binding.verified_source_note: Final branch commit before merge; evidence generated pre-merge and will be re-tied by post-merge-lane-close.yml via ops:proof-generate --merge-sha

context.reason_for_t1: Governance-critical / fail-open / OS-v1-lock-blocking trust-boundary fix per PM directive. A prior codex-return-reviewer finding on PR #1184 (UTV2-1518) showed the manifest-embedded scope_override field let any PR self-certify its own file-scope widening (approved_by/reason/evidence were free-text strings inside the PR's own diff, never authenticated against anything external). This lane removes that field entirely and replaces it with an externally-authored PR comment (scope-override/v1) authenticated against AUTHORIZED_REVIEWERS, the same trust model merge-gate.yml already uses for pm-verdict/v1 and executor-result/v1.
context.quarantine_note: Per explicit PM instruction, the old manifest-embedded scope_override mechanism was quarantined for all new use during this fix. UTV2-1517, UTV2-1519, and UTV2-1520 used it as a legitimate-but-unsafe workaround for the file-scope-guard's pre-existing 'immutable manifest baseline' behavior (a manifest new to a branch is trusted only at its first-commit content) -- their use is documented, not treated as proof the mechanism was safe.

r_level.rules_matched: (none) — no R-level artifacts required for this diff

scripts/ci/file-scope-guard.test.ts: external override: wrong-PR override does not apply

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Manifest-embedded scope_override is removed and never honored, even if well-formed
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: scripts/ci/file-scope-guard.ts diff removes ScopeOverride/isWellFormedScopeOverride and the manifest-honoring branch; regression test in file-scope-guard.test.ts asserts this

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Replacement override authenticated against something external to the PR-controlled manifest
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: docs/05_operations/schemas/scope-override-v1.md + .github/workflows/file-scope-lock-check.yml: override is read from a PR *comment* authored by an AUTHORIZED_REVIEWERS member, not from the manifest JSON

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Override binds to issue_id, PR number, head SHA, paths, authorizer, reason, expiration (implicit via head-SHA binding)
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: ExternalScopeOverride interface + resolveApplicableOverride() in file-scope-guard.ts; a push (new head SHA) invalidates a prior override

acceptance_criteria_mapping.criterion: Fails closed on any mismatch (wrong issue, wrong PR, stale SHA, self-authored)
acceptance_criteria_mapping.evidence: resolveApplicableOverride() requires exact match on all three keys; 5 new test scenarios cover each failure mode plus the valid-accept and cross-lane-leak cases
scripts/ops/merge-risk.ts: file-scope-guard.ts and its test added to TIER_C_EXACT_PATHS
